arts.ttl: “Swiftly rejected” | West Ham reject offer for star player
arts.sum: West Ham have rejected a loan bid for star player who failed to impress under Lopetegui. Despite the Summer transfer window not being as successful as it seemed on paper, the last few seasons have seen West Ham sign some unbelievable players. By far one of the best is Edson Alvarez. arts.ttl: Great to pick up first West Ham win - Potter
arts.sum: Graham Potter says it feels "great" to pick up his first win as West Ham United head coach, though he admits the victory against Fulham was "stressful" at times.

arts.ttl: West Ham edge five-goal thriller against Fulham to give Potter first win
arts.sum: Graham Potter won his first Premier League match in charge of West Ham United as they overcame Fulham 3-2 in an entertaining affair on Tuesday. Potter's first Premier League match in charge West Ham produced three points, providing some overdue positivity at the London Stadium.

arts.ttl: “Viable proposition” | West Ham could still pull off unbelievable signing
arts.sum: West Ham could still sign Marcus Rashford on loan but Manchester United would rather he moved elsewhere. The idea of West Ham being direct competition to Manchester United a matter of years ago would have been unthinkable. However, they have been fighting each other for European spots the last few years, and now they are... arts.ttl: Silva laments Fulham errors after unbeaten run ends
arts.sum: Marco Silva admitted Fulham only had themselves to blame after their nine-match unbeaten run ended at West Ham. They lost 3-2 at the London Stadium, where they were on top in the first half only to concede two goals in quick succession. arts.ttl: Former Arsenal and Chelsea star Willian attracting interest from Premier League clubs after terminating his contract with Olympiacos
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Former Arsenal and Chelsea winger Willian could be set for a sensational return to the Premier League . The 36-year-old's last stint in the English top flight came at Fulham .

arts.ttl: Graham Potter makes West Ham admission despite 'absolutely top' first win and delivers transfer update
arts.sum: Hammers emerged victorious in an entertaining London derby on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: West Ham target Bundesliga star to fix their attacking problems after injuries to Michail Antonio, Jarrod Bowen and Niclas Fullkrug
arts.sum: Antonio will miss the rest of the season after his horror car accident last month, while Fullkrug is expected to be sidelined for several weeks with a significant hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Graham Potter: West Ham have set a foundation after riding luck to beat Fulham
arts.sum: Goals from Carlos Soler, Tomas Soucek and Lucas Paqueta made it a winning start in the Premier League for new boss Potter.

arts.ttl: Graham Potter gets West Ham spell up and running with win over Fulham
arts.sum: Goals from Carlos Soler, Tomas Soucek and Lucas Paqueta secured a first Premier League victory for Potter.
